name: Irish Cream Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the dark sweet chocolate for the ganache.
2. Stir in the heavy cream and Irish Cream Liqueur until smooth.
3. Let the ganache cool to room temperature.
4. Once cooled, stir in the liqueur before refrigerating.
5. Melt additional dark chocolate for dipping.
6. Dip truffles in the melted chocolate and vegetable oil mixture.
7. Roll dipped truffles in chocolate sprinkles.
8. Refrigerate until set.
